name: china-southern-power-grid-mcp
description: China Southern Power Grid (CSG) account query service, supporting both Model Context Protocol (MCP) server and zero-dependency Skill package.

scripts.build: tsc && esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=skills/china-southern-power-grid-stat/scripts/cli.cjs && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('session.json')) { fs.copyFileSync('session.json', 'skills/china-southern-power-grid-stat/session.json'); console.log('Successfully copied session.json to Skill folder.'); }"
